## Meeting Purpose

[Daily CM standup to discuss progress, challenges, and strategies for client work, particularly focusing on Sunbit and AIMBIT projects.](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Client retention challenges: Town on hold, AIMBIT unhappy but continuing](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Sunbit project: 25 articles due tomorrow, focus on B2B content with case studies](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Content strategy: Generalizing case studies, balancing real data with anonymity](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [AI impact: Shifting focus to middle and bottom of funnel content due to AI's dominance in top-of-funnel searches](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Topics

### Client Status and Challenges

  - [Town: Happy but on hold due to go-to-market changes](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [AIMBIT: Unhappy client, approving only 1-2 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
      - [No traffic increase, making progress difficult to show](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [Potential new product/feature launches mentioned by client](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Strategy for AIMBIT: Suggested publishing 5-6 articles/week for 3 months to see traffic surge](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

### Sunbit Project Progress

  - [25 articles due by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [B2B articles being produced, including case studies](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Challenge: Repetitive content due to limited Sunbit advantages](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Success with case study articles using AI and existing customer stories](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

### Content Strategy for Case Studies

  - [Use real case studies from Sunbit's website as primary source](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Generalize and anonymize information (e.g., "family-run dealership in California")](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Highlight areas where Sunbit can customize with real names/data](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Aim for 700-800 word case studies](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Balance between publishable content and customizable templates](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### AI's Impact on Content Marketing

  - [AI dominance in top-of-funnel searches](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Shift focus to middle and bottom of funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Traditional SEO methods (Google searches, cookies, ads) becoming less effective](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete 25 Sunbit articles by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Generalize and anonymize case studies, highlighting customizable areas](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Focus on easier B2B topics before tackling case studies](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Continue work on new B2B dental practice adoption topics](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Team to communicate via Slack for any issues or questions](https://fathom.video/share/H81fJaDgCwB1awzed9TyFFNbPZq2Fxss?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
